Event: Darkness Castle Siege Dec 2024
Event Date: 12/12/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: A95
Toy Madness Artifact

Triggers: Duration of battle

Every 3 seconds, the artifact owner strikes the ground, creating a deafening sound wave that has a 50% chance to deal 250000 magic damage and stun each enemy hit by it for 1 sec. If an enemy has already been stunned while taking damage from the sound wave, the damage to that unit becomes pure, and instead of being stunned, that unit is turned to stone for 1 sec. They can't move and take 35% more damage.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: item not rated yet

First trigger: Duration of battle
